basics.name: David Castrillón Gonzales
basics.label: Senior Frontend Engineer (React, TypeScript, SSR, Microfrontends)
basics.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer focused on React and TypeScript. Designs scalable frontend architecture (SSR and microfrontends), builds design systems and reusable components, and ships high‑quality UI with automated tests. Experienced with Remix/React Router v7 SSR. Collaborates closely with product and backend teams and uses AI‑assisted workflows to improve delivery speed and quality.

work.name: Yuno
work.summary: Owns frontend architecture and product delivery using React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite microfrontends, and SSR with Remix/React Router v7.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite (microfrontends), Remix/React Router v7 (SSR), Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, Zustand, Vitest.
Improved reconciliation workflows and UI flows across the product using React, TypeScript, and React Query.
Shipped a user‑configurable alerting feature for missing settlements and liquidations.
Contributed to a product redesign focused on UX, maintainability, and frontend architecture.
Designed and scaffolded a Backoffice SSR application; the architecture and scaffolding were adopted by multiple teams.
Applied AI‑assisted development practices across design, implementation, and documentation to increase delivery quality and speed.

work.name: Conekta
work.summary: React and TypeScript frontend development for back-office platforms with Chakra UI and Material UI.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Material UI, REST APIs.
Maintained and improved a back‑office application, shipping features with React and TypeScript.
Built and maintained reusable UI components and patterns with Chakra UI and Material UI.
Integrated REST APIs with backend services in Go and Node.js.

work.name: Mercado Libre
work.summary: Frontend development for large‑scale applications using React and TypeScript.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
Contributed to an insurance platform migration, delivering features with React and TypeScript.
Worked in distributed agile teams on large codebases.

work.name: Bancolombia
work.summary: Quality engineering and automation for web, mobile, and services.
highlights: Tech stack: Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, Java, AS400.
Led testing teams and defined automation strategies and quality standards.
Automated tests for web, mobile, and APIs using Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, and Cucumber.
Built batch testing automation using AS400 libraries in Java.

projects.name: Portfolio
highlights: Built a personal portfolio site using Astro and Tailwind CSS.
